## Must fix (Critical) ‚Äî ALL DONE

- [x] `svg-id.ts` id XSS ‚Äî escape assembled id (incl. layer prefix) at all four
  `<g id="‚Ä¶">` sites (`svg-helpers.ts:184,224`, `svg-cluster.ts:17`,
  `svg-graph.ts:132`) via `escapeXmlTitle`. Left `job.obj.id` raw so the
  imagemap/anchor consumers keep escaping at their own emission points.
- [x] `svg.ts` attachment `stroke` ‚Äî resolve fontcolor via
  `colorPaint(resolveRenderColor(...))`.
- [x] `svg-edge-split.ts:90` multicolor `stroke` ‚Äî resolve segment color.
- [x] `svg-multicolor.ts:213,267` wedged/striped fill ‚Äî assign
  `resolveRenderColor(seg.color)` instead of raw `{type:'string'}`.
- [x] `stress-kernel.ts:347`, `splines.ts:956` ‚Äî `typeof process !== 'undefined'`
  guard on `process.env['STRESS_DEBUG']`.

## Should fix (Warning) ‚Äî ALL DONE

- [x] `index.ts` + `parser/index.ts` ‚Äî `parse()` normalizes non-string input and
  stack-overflow (`RangeError`) to a typed `ParseError`; `renderSvg` now calls
  `parse()` inside its try so any residual throw becomes a `GvError`.
- [x] `api/geometry.ts` `getLayout` ‚Äî throws `RenderError` when the graph is not
  laid out (new `GraphInfo.laidOut` flag set in `GvcContext.layout`); JSDoc
  corrected. Flag is not cleared by `freeLayout` (coords persist, so the
  "render then getLayout" workflow stays valid).

## Consider improving (Suggestion)

Done:
- [x] `GVContext = unknown` stub ‚Üí aliased to the real `GvcContext` (type-only
  import); dropped the three ad-hoc `{textMeasurer?}` casts + now-unused imports.
- [x] `package.json` ‚Äî `canvas` peer capped to `>=2 <4`; added `engines.node`.
- [x] non-string `parse()` guard (folded into the Warning fix above).
- [x] `api/builder.ts:123,178,204` ‚Äî plain `Error` ‚Üí typed `RenderError`.

Deferred, with rationale (left for a follow-up):
- [ ] `map.ts:377,383`, `svg-helpers.ts:253` `escapeXml`‚Üí`escapeXmlTitle` ‚Äî pure
  byte-fidelity vs the **oracle-verified** map output; `escapeXmlTitle` also
  wouldn't stop the theoretical `\n` imap injection (it doesn't escape newlines,
  matching upstream `gvputs_xml`). Per this repo's rule, instrument the C oracle
  before changing oracle-verified emission. Not flipped on an unverified reading.
- [ ] unknown-throw `RenderError.message` leakage (`index.ts:90`,
  `public.ts:109`) ‚Äî the path is `/* v8 ignore */` defensive/near-unreachable
  and `friendlyMessage` is already the documented safe display field. Left as-is.
- [ ] `render()` lifecycle dedup + a `tryRender` envelope ‚Äî style/parity only;
  adding new public API without a driving need is unrequested surface (YAGNI).
- [ ] `parser/index.ts:225` peggy `as ParsedGraph` narrowing ‚Äî grammar and
  `ast.ts` are co-maintained and parser-test-covered; a wrong runtime discriminant
  risks rejecting valid input for little gain.
- [ ] `package.json` `packageManager` Corepack pin + `typescript ^6‚Üí^7` ‚Äî both
  are workflow/toolchain choices needing a supervised reinstall + build; left to
  the maintainer.
- [ ] `injectOraclePositions` (`splines.ts:929`) `node:fs` path ‚Äî already guarded
  and no-ops in browsers; hygiene-only relocation.
- [ ] `vitepress@1.6.4` nested `esbuild` CVE ‚Äî dev-only, not shipped, no
  non-alpha fix available upstream.
